chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 227 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.6362/2025 (C/A) 14-10-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate holding brief for Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Abdul Razak Arain, Chairman Market Committee, Daharki is present and produced three original post-dated cheque Nos.39132523, 39132524 and 39132525 dated 15-10-2025, 15-11-2025 and 15-12-2025, respectively, in favour of Petitioner of Rs.114350/- each. All three original cheques are handed over to the Petitioner, namely Syed Abdul Majeed Shah holding CNIC # 45102-1445698-9, under proper acknowledgment. The officer present in Court submits that entire outstanding amount has been paid to the Petitioner. Under the circumstances, the listed Contempt Application, having served out its purpose, is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
